The MH-6 is a light and agile helicopter
mostly used for special operations and 
close combats.

The Boeing AH-64 Apache is an attack helicopter
with various sensors and onboard avionics to
destroy grounded targets within long range.

The Kamov Ka-50 is a single-seat attack helicopter
using a distinctive coaxial rotor system and used
to destroy grounded targets within close range.

descriptions.value: Many local space traders make multiple journeys in a day to make ends meet.
Making complete galactic diagrams with notes about demand and conditions is essential for any successful trader.
Pirate attacks are the bane of any galactic trader. The Krog Clan ships pictured here are particularly vicious.
This is a typical example of a planet city, teeming with commerce. Its name has long since been lost to poorly kept records.
Nothing makes a veteran trader drool more than an unexploited planet system.
Larger cities such as this one carry many potential riches for the smart galactic trader.
Modern cargo bays like this one are fully automated and make things much easier for the crew of a galactic trader.
